subject: docs: add DaisyUI sync points, modal z-index notes, theme picker TODO
body:
Document maintenance requirements discovered during migration:
- CLAUDE.md AI Notes: 3 sync points for theme combos (themes.ts,
  index.css plugin config, index.html flash prevention), and why
  z-[60] must stay on modals (overrides DaisyUI's z-999)
- TODO.md: theme combo picker UI needed — useDarkMode exposes
  setCombo() but no UI exists in the burger menu yet

Tags: docs, daisyui, theme
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BPc1xJr4LVbLgvTxtZf2i1
